mapper.select: SELECT cm.id, cm.session_id, cm.sender_id, cm.receiver_id, cm.content, cm.content_type, cm.send_time, cm.is_read, sender.name AS sender_name, receiver.name AS receiver_name FROM chat_message cm LEFT JOIN user sender ON cm.sender_id = sender.id LEFT JOIN user receiver ON cm.receiver_id = receiver.id WHERE cm.session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY cm.send_time ASC

SELECT latest.session_id, CASE WHEN latest.sender_id = #{adminUserId} THEN latest.receiver_id ELSE latest.sender_id END AS user_id, CASE WHEN latest.sender_id = #{adminUserId} THEN receiver.name ELSE sender.name END AS user_name, COALESCE(unread.unread_count, 0) AS unread_count, latest.content AS last_message, latest.send_time AS last_message_time FROM ( SELECT cm.* FROM chat_message cm INNER JOIN ( SELECT session_id, MAX(send_time) AS max_time FROM chat_message WHERE sender_id = #{adminUserId} OR receiver_id = #{adminUserId} GROUP BY session_id ) t ON cm.session_id = t.session_id AND cm.send_time = t.max_time WHERE cm.sender_id = #{adminUserId} OR cm.receiver_id = #{adminUserId} ) latest LEFT JOIN user sender ON latest.sender_id = sender.id LEFT JOIN user receiver ON latest.receiver_id = receiver.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT session_id, COUNT(*) AS unread_count FROM chat_message WHERE receiver_id = #{adminUserId} AND is_read = 0 GROUP BY session_id ) unread ON unread.session_id = latest.session_id ORDER BY latest.send_time DESC

SELECT latest.session_id, CASE WHEN sender.role = 'ADMIN' THEN latest.receiver_id ELSE latest.sender_id END AS user_id, CASE WHEN sender.role = 'ADMIN' THEN receiver.name ELSE sender.name END AS user_name, COALESCE(unread.unread_count, 0) AS unread_count, latest.content AS last_message, latest.send_time AS last_message_time FROM ( SELECT cm.* FROM chat_message cm INNER JOIN ( SELECT session_id, MAX(send_time) AS max_time FROM chat_message WHERE sender_id IN (SELECT id FROM user WHERE role = 'ADMIN') OR receiver_id IN (SELECT id FROM user WHERE role = 'ADMIN') GROUP BY session_id ) t ON cm.session_id = t.session_id AND cm.send_time = t.max_time WHERE cm.sender_id IN (SELECT id FROM user WHERE role = 'ADMIN') OR cm.receiver_id IN (SELECT id FROM user WHERE role = 'ADMIN') ) latest LEFT JOIN user sender ON latest.sender_id = sender.id LEFT JOIN user receiver ON latest.receiver_id = receiver.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT session_id, COUNT(*) AS unread_count FROM chat_message WHERE receiver_id IN (SELECT id FROM user WHERE role = 'ADMIN') AND is_read = 0 GROUP BY session_id ) unread ON unread.session_id = latest.session_id ORDER BY latest.send_time DESC

SELECT cm.id, cm.session_id, cm.sender_id, cm.receiver_id, cm.content, cm.content_type, cm.send_time, cm.is_read, sender.name AS sender_name, receiver.name AS receiver_name FROM chat_message cm LEFT JOIN user sender ON cm.sender_id = sender.id LEFT JOIN user receiver ON cm.receiver_id = receiver.id
AND cm.session_id = #{sessionId}
AND MATCH(cm.content) AGAINST(#{keyword} IN NATURAL LANGUAGE MODE)
ORDER BY cm.send_time DESC
